---
title: "Statistics"
description: "A quick summary of the fundamentals needed to perform inference with the statistical models we are about to consider.  This includes sampling distributions, the Central Limit Theorem, the Laws of Large Numbers, hypothesis testing and confidence intervals."
author: "John Robin Inston"
date: "2026-05-15"
date-modified: "2026-05-15"
toc: true
title-block-banner: false
sidebar: pstat100-notes
page-navigation: true
execute:
    echo: true
---
